reason.description: Full report body. Only populated on admin fetches (getReport); listReports responses may omit this.

resolutionLabel.description: If the report was resolved with an accompanying label application, the label value applied.

target.description: Target identifier (AT-URI, DID, report ID, etc.) — semantics depend on action.

reason.description: Structured JSON or free text; action-specific schema documented in src/writer.rs AUDIT_REASON_SCHEMA.

prevHash.description: Hex-encoded SHA-256 of the prior row's row_hash; the audit chain link (#39, v1.3). Absent for pre-v1.3 rows that haven't been backfilled by `cairn audit-rebuild` (the trust-horizon convention). 64 lowercase hex chars when present. The genesis row's prevHash is the all-zeros sentinel (`0000...0000`).

rowHash.description: Hex-encoded SHA-256 of `prevHash || dag_cbor_canonical(row_content)` (#39, v1.3). Absent for pre-v1.3 rows that haven't been backfilled by `cairn audit-rebuild`. 64 lowercase hex chars when present.

publicKeyMultibase.description: Multibase-encoded ES256K public key — matches the `verificationMethod[*].publicKeyMultibase` form published in /.well-known/did.json.

validTo.description: Set when the key was rotated out; absent when the key is still valid (§F8 rotation-shaped schema).

isActive.description: True when validTo is absent or in the future.

addedBy.description: DID of the moderator who added this entry via the HTTP-attested admin endpoint. Absent when the row was inserted via CLI or direct DB write.

provenanceAttested.description: False when addedBy is absent (CLI-initiated inserts pre-dating HTTP-attested moderator-add flows). True when addedBy carries a verified caller DID.

contentHash.description: SHA-256 hex of the published service record's canonical encoding, excluding createdAt (§F1 idempotency surface). Matches labeler_config.service_record_content_hash.

labelValues.description: Declared label-value short names from the loaded [labeler] config. The honest 'taxonomy version' surface for v1.2 — when proper taxonomy versioning lands later, this shape can grow.

version.description: Semver of the running cairn-mod binary (CARGO_PKG_VERSION at build time).

subjectStrikeState.description: Currently-active strike state for a subject (#50 decay calculator output, with operator-friendly extras for the read endpoints). Returned by tools.cairn.admin.getSubjectStrikes (this commit) and the public-tier tools.cairn.public.getMyStrikeState (#54).

currentStrikeCount.description: Active strike total after decay and revocation. The value the recorder feeds the strike calculator (#49) as `current_strike_count` on the next action.

rawTotal.description: Lifetime sum of strike_value_applied across all strike-bearing (non-warning, non-note) actions, ignoring decay and revocation.

decayedCount.description: Strikes lost to time-based decay across unrevoked strike-bearing actions. Equal to (rawTotal - revokedCount) - currentStrikeCount.

revokedCount.description: Sum of strike_value_applied across revoked strike-bearing actions. Surfaced separately for forensic display.

activeSuspension.description: The most recent unrevoked suspension that's currently in force, if any.

decayWindowRemainingDays.description: Days remaining until the most recent strike-bearing action falls out of the decay window — a rough 'returns to good standing at current trajectory' surface for operator dashboards. Omitted when currentStrikeCount is 0 (nothing to decay).

lastActionAt.description: effective_at of the most recent strike-bearing unrevoked action; absent if none.

activeLabels.description: ATProto labels cairn-mod is currently emitting against this subject — one entry per non-revoked, non-negated action that emitted labels (#65, v1.5). Empty array when the subject has no emitted labels OR every emitted action has been revoked. Includes labels whose `expiresAt` is in the past — exp-based visibility is the consumer AppView's responsibility, and cairn-mod surfaces what it has emitted regardless. Order is most-recent-action first.

activeLabel.description: Per-action active-label entry returned on subjectStrikeState.activeLabels (#65, v1.5). Action-centric: the action label's `val` plus the reason codes that produced reason-labels alongside it. To recover a reason label's `val`, prefix each `reasonCodes` entry with the operator's [label_emission].reason_label_prefix (default `reason-`).

val.description: Action label value as emitted on the wire (e.g., `!takedown`, `!hide`, `!warn`). Matches the labels table's val column for the (src, uri, val) tuple cairn-mod has signed.

actionId.description: subject_actions.id of the action that emitted this label set. Lets clients correlate active labels with subjectAction history rows.

actionType.description: subject_actions.action_type for the source row (one of `takedown`, `temp_suspension`, `indef_suspension`, `warning`). Surfaced so clients can render the label set in operator-meaningful terms without a second lookup. `note` never appears here — notes don't emit labels.

reasonCodes.description: Operator-vocabulary reason identifiers from [moderation_reasons] (#47) that produced reason-labels alongside the action label. Empty array when the action emitted with emit_reason_labels=false at recording time.

expiresAt.description: RFC-3339 wall-clock the action's emitted labels stop being honored by consumer AppViews (mirrors subject_actions.expires_at). Set for temp_suspension; absent for takedown / indef_suspension. May be in the past — cairn-mod surfaces emitted state regardless of consumer-side exp filtering.

activeSuspension.description: Summary of a subject's currently-active suspension, returned on subjectStrikeState.activeSuspension.

pendingAction.description: One row from the pending_policy_actions table (§F22, #70). Returned by tools.cairn.admin.listPendingActions and tools.cairn.admin.getPendingAction (#77). A pending row holds a proposed action that a mode=flag rule firing queued for moderator review (#73); resolution columns transition NULL → 'confirmed' (#74) or 'dismissed' (#75 / #76 cascade) once acted on.

subjectDid.description: Account DID the proposed action would target.

subjectUri.description: AT-URI for record-level proposed actions; absent for account-level.

durationIso.description: ISO-8601 duration (canonical PT<seconds>S form). Only present when actionType is temp_suspension.

reasonCodes.description: Reason identifiers from the operator's [moderation_reasons] vocabulary, frozen at proposal time.

triggeredByPolicyRule.description: Name of the [policy_automation.<rule>] sub-block that fired and queued this pending.

triggeredAt.description: RFC-3339 wall-clock the rule fired (== the triggering recordAction's effective_at).

triggeringActionId.description: subject_actions.id of the precipitating action whose strike contribution caused the rule's threshold to be crossed.

resolution.description: Resolution state. 'pending' (wire) corresponds to a NULL resolution column in storage — i.e., still awaiting moderator action.

resolvedAt.description: RFC-3339 wall-clock the pending was resolved. Absent while resolution is 'pending'.

resolvedByDid.description: DID of the moderator (or synthetic policy DID for cascade auto-dismissals per #76) that resolved the pending. Absent while resolution is 'pending'.

confirmedActionId.description: subject_actions.id of the materialized action created when this pending was confirmed (#74). Only present when resolution is 'confirmed'.

subjectAction.description: One row from the subject_actions table (§F20 graduated-action moderation). Returned by tools.cairn.admin.recordAction (after insert) and by the read-half history/strikes endpoints (#52, ships in a follow-up commit).

subjectDid.description: Account DID the action attributes to. For record-level actions this is the parent repo DID; strike accounting always rolls up here.

subjectUri.description: AT-URI for record-level actions; absent for account-level.

actorDid.description: Moderator/admin who recorded the action (JWT iss when via XRPC; CLI caller DID otherwise). For policy-recorded actions (§F22), this is the synthetic policy DID `did:internal:policy`.

actorKind.description: Discriminator for who recorded the action: `moderator` for moderator-driven recordAction calls and confirmed-pending materializations; `policy` for actions the policy automation engine recorded directly via a mode=auto rule firing (§F22). Always populated; pre-v1.6 rows backfill to `moderator` via the column default.

triggeredByPolicyRule.description: Name of the [policy_automation.<rule>] sub-block that produced this action (§F22). Present when `actorKind` is `policy` (auto-recorded firings) and on moderator-confirmed pending materializations (where actor_kind is `moderator` but the rule's name is preserved as forensic provenance per the confirm-flow contract). Absent for moderator-recorded actions the policy engine had no hand in.

reasonCodes.description: Reason identifiers from the operator's [moderation_reasons] vocabulary.

duration.description: Original ISO-8601 duration (e.g. P7D), preserved for display. Only present for temp_suspension.

expiresAt.description: Wall-clock the action ends. Only present for temp_suspension.

strikeValueBase.description: Reason's base_weight before dampening. 0 for warning/note.

strikeValueApplied.description: Strike weight actually applied after dampening.

auditLogId.description: audit_log row id this action's intent was attested as.
